name: io.github.hairglasses-studio.dotfiles-mcp
description: Desktop environment management: Hyprland, shaders, Bluetooth, MIDI, OSS scoring

tools.name: dotfiles_list_configs
tools.description: List dotfiles config directories with symlink health and format

tools.name: dotfiles_validate_config
tools.description: Validate TOML or JSON config syntax

tools.name: dotfiles_reload_service
tools.description: Reload desktop service (hyprland, mako, eww, waybar, sway, tmux)

tools.name: dotfiles_check_symlinks
tools.description: Check health of all expected dotfiles symlinks

tools.name: dotfiles_gh_list_personal_repos
tools.description: List personal repos with fork/visibility metadata

tools.name: dotfiles_gh_list_org_repos
tools.description: List org repos with local clone sync status

tools.name: dotfiles_gh_transfer_repos
tools.description: Bulk transfer non-fork repos to org

tools.name: dotfiles_gh_recreate_forks
tools.description: Squash forks into fresh org repos

tools.name: dotfiles_gh_onboard_repos
tools.description: Fork public repos, squash history, clone locally (batch)

tools.name: dotfiles_gh_local_sync_audit
tools.description: Audit local dirs vs org repos (orphaned/missing/mismatched)

tools.name: dotfiles_gh_bulk_clone
tools.description: Clone all missing org repos locally

tools.name: dotfiles_gh_pull_all
tools.description: Fetch/pull all local repos (detects dirty/detached)

tools.name: dotfiles_gh_clean_stale
tools.description: Remove orphaned local clones (safety: checks uncommitted/unpushed)

tools.name: dotfiles_gh_full_sync
tools.description: One-command fleet sync (pull + audit + clone missing)

tools.name: dotfiles_gh_bulk_archive
tools.description: Batch archive repos

tools.name: dotfiles_gh_bulk_settings
tools.description: Batch apply repo settings with before/after reporting

tools.name: dotfiles_fleet_audit
tools.description: Per-repo language, Go version, CI status, test count, commit age, CLAUDE.md presence

tools.name: dotfiles_health_check
tools.description: Org-wide health dashboard

tools.name: dotfiles_dep_audit
tools.description: Go dependency version skew across fleet

tools.name: dotfiles_workflow_sync
tools.description: Sync CI workflows from canonical sources

tools.name: dotfiles_pipeline_run
tools.description: Run build+test pipeline on a repo (Go/Node/Python)

tools.name: dotfiles_bulk_pipeline
tools.description: Run pipeline across N repos with language filtering

tools.name: dotfiles_go_sync
tools.description: Sync Go version across all repos

tools.name: dotfiles_mcpkit_version_sync
tools.description: Sync mcpkit dependency across all thin MCP servers

tools.name: dotfiles_create_repo
tools.description: Scaffold new repo with standard files

tools.name: dotfiles_cascade_reload
tools.description: Ordered multi-service reload with health verification

tools.name: dotfiles_rice_check
tools.description: Compositor/shader/wallpaper/service status + Snazzy palette compliance

tools.name: dotfiles_eww_restart
tools.description: Kill and restart eww daemon with both bars

tools.name: dotfiles_eww_status
tools.description: Show eww daemon health, windows, key variables

tools.name: dotfiles_eww_get
tools.description: Query current eww variable value

tools.name: dotfiles_onboard_repo
tools.description: Add standard files to any repo (.editorconfig, CI, LICENSE)

tools.name: hypr_list_windows
tools.description: List all windows with address, title, class, workspace

tools.name: hypr_list_workspaces
tools.description: List workspaces with window count, monitor, focused status

tools.name: hypr_get_monitors
tools.description: List monitors with resolution, refresh rate, position, scale

tools.name: hypr_screenshot
tools.description: Capture screenshot (single monitor or all)

tools.name: hypr_screenshot_monitors
tools.description: Capture separate screenshots per monitor

tools.name: hypr_focus_window
tools.description: Focus window by address or class name

tools.name: hypr_switch_workspace
tools.description: Switch to workspace by ID

tools.name: hypr_reload_config
tools.description: Reload Hyprland config and check for errors

tools.name: hypr_click
tools.description: Click at coordinates using ydotool

tools.name: hypr_type_text
tools.description: Type text at cursor using wtype

tools.name: hypr_key
tools.description: Send key events using ydotool

tools.name: hypr_set_monitor
tools.description: Configure monitor resolution, position, or scale

tools.name: shader_list
tools.description: List GLSL shaders, optionally filter by category

tools.name: shader_set
tools.description: Apply shader to Ghostty via atomic config write

tools.name: shader_cycle
tools.description: Advance shader playlist (next/prev)

tools.name: shader_random
tools.description: Pick and apply a random shader

tools.name: shader_status
tools.description: Current shader, animation state, playlist position, auto-rotate

tools.name: shader_meta
tools.description: Full manifest metadata (category, cost, source, playlists)

tools.name: shader_test
tools.description: Compile-test shaders via glslangValidator

tools.name: shader_build
tools.description: Preprocess and validate shaders

tools.name: shader_playlist
tools.description: List playlists or pick random shader from one

tools.name: shader_get_state
tools.description: Read active shader from Ghostty config

tools.name: wallpaper_set
tools.description: Set a live wallpaper shader via shaderbg

tools.name: wallpaper_random
tools.description: Set random wallpaper shader

tools.name: wallpaper_list
tools.description: List available wallpaper shaders

tools.name: bt_list_devices
tools.description: List BT devices with connection status and battery levels

tools.name: bt_device_info
tools.description: Detailed device info (battery, profiles, trust, UUIDs)

tools.name: bt_scan
tools.description: Scan for nearby devices with configurable timeout (default 8s)

tools.name: bt_pair
tools.description: Pair with interactive agent (BLE-safe, handles auth handshake)

tools.name: bt_connect
tools.description: Connect with BLE retry logic, resolves names against all known devices

tools.name: bt_disconnect
tools.description: Disconnect a device

tools.name: bt_remove
tools.description: Forget a paired device

tools.name: bt_trust
tools.description: Trust or untrust a device

tools.name: bt_power
tools.description: Toggle BT adapter power

tools.name: input_detect_controllers
tools.description: Scan for gamepads with brand detection and makima profile status

tools.name: input_generate_controller_profile
tools.description: Generate makima profile from template (desktop/gaming/media/macropad)

tools.name: input_controller_test
tools.description: Detect controllers, generate missing profiles, optionally restart makima

tools.name: input_status
tools.description: Show running state of input services (logid, makima) and battery levels

tools.name: input_get_logiops_config
tools.description: Read current logiops config for Logitech mice

tools.name: input_set_logiops_config
tools.description: Write logiops config, optionally deploy to /etc/logid.cfg + restart logid

tools.name: input_restart_services
tools.description: Restart input device services (logid, makima, or both; requires sudo)

tools.name: input_list_makima_profiles
tools.description: List all per-app button remapping profiles

tools.name: input_get_makima_profile
tools.description: Read a specific makima profile by name

tools.name: input_set_makima_profile
tools.description: Create or update a makima profile (validates TOML)

tools.name: input_delete_makima_profile
tools.description: Delete a makima profile

tools.name: input_get_solaar_settings
tools.description: Read Solaar settings for Logitech devices

tools.name: input_set_solaar_setting
tools.description: Set a Solaar device setting

tools.name: midi_list_devices
tools.description: Detect connected USB MIDI controllers via ALSA

tools.name: midi_generate_mapping
tools.description: Generate MIDI controller mapping config from template

tools.name: midi_get_mapping
tools.description: Read existing MIDI controller mapping config

tools.name: midi_set_mapping
tools.description: Create or update MIDI mapping (validates TOML)

tools.name: bt_discover_and_connect
tools.description: Scan, find, remove stale, pair (with agent), trust, connect (with retry)

tools.name: input_auto_setup_controller
tools.description: Detect controllers, generate missing profiles, restart makima

tools.name: dotfiles_oss_score
tools.description: Score a repo's open-source readiness (0-100) across 8 categories

tools.name: dotfiles_oss_check
tools.description: Run checks for a single category with detailed suggestions

tools.name: prompt_capture
tools.description: Capture a prompt with auto-scoring (SHA-256 dedup, 10-dimension quality scoring)

tools.name: prompt_search
tools.description: Full-text + tag/repo/score/status filter search

tools.name: prompt_get
tools.description: Retrieve single prompt by hash

tools.name: prompt_tag
tools.description: Add/remove tags (validated against taxonomy)

tools.name: prompt_score
tools.description: Re-score prompt via 10-dimension scoring

tools.name: prompt_improve
tools.description: Run 13-stage enhancement pipeline, save to sorted/

tools.name: prompt_stats
tools.description: Aggregate statistics by repo/status/task_type/grade

tools.name: prompt_export
tools.description: Export matching prompts as JSONL or markdown
